flavor_text: The user slams the target with its wings. The target is hit twice in a row.

name: Bitter Blade
flavor_text: The user focuses its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

name: Nightmare
effect: Only works on sleeping Pokémon.  Gives the target a nightmare, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP every turn.  If the target wakes up or leaves the field, this effect ends.
flavor_text: A sleeper loses 1/4 HP every turn.

name: Secret Power
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to inflict an effect chosen according to the terrain.  Terrain        | Effect -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- Building       | Paralyzes target Cave           | Makes target flinch Deep water     | Lowers target’s Attack by one stage Desert         | Lowers target’s accuracy by one stage Grass          | Puts target to sleep Mountain       | Makes target flinch Road           | Lowers target’s accuracy by one stage Shallow water  | Lowers target’s Attack by one stage Snow           | Freezes target Tall grass     | Puts target to sleep  In Pokémon Battle Revolution:  Terrain        | Effect -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- Courtyard      | Paralyzes target Crystal        | Makes target flinch Gateway        | Lowers target’s Attack by one stage Magma          | Makes target flinch Main Street    | Paralyzes target Neon           | Paralyzes target Stargazer      | Makes target flinch Sunny Park     | Puts target to sleep Sunset         | Lowers target’s accuracy by one stage Waterfall      | Puts target to sleep
flavor_text: An attack with effects that vary by location.

name: Slack Off
effect: Heals the user for half its max HP.
flavor_text: Slacks off and restores half the maximum HP.

name: Mud Bomb
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: The user launches a hard-packed mud ball to attack. It may also lower the target’s accuracy.

name: Poison Jab
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: The foe is stabbed with a tentacle or arm steeped in poison. It may also poison the foe.

name: Silver Wind
effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise all of the user’s stats one stage.
flavor_text: A powdery attack that may raise abilities.

name: Psychic Fangs
effect: Destroys any light screen or reflect on the target’s side of the field, then inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user bites the target with its psychic capabilities. This can also destroy Light Screen and Reflect.

name: Dragon Cheer
flavor_text: The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.

name: Kings Shield
effect: Blocks damaging attacks and lowers attacking Pokémon’s Attack by two stages on contact.  Switches Aegislash to Shield Forme.
flavor_text: The user takes a defensive stance while it protects itself from damage. It also harshly lowers the Attack stat of any attacker who makes direct contact.

name: Dual Chop
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn.
flavor_text: The user attacks its target by hitting it with brutal strikes. The target is hit twice in a row.

name: Dragon Hammer
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user uses its body like a hammer to attack the target and inflict damage.

name: Switcheroo
effect: User and target permanently swap held items.  Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything.  If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail.  If either Pokémon has multitype or sticky hold, this move will fail.  If this move results in a Pokémon obtaining choice band, choice scarf, or choice specs, and that Pokémon was the latter of the pair to move this turn, then the move it used this turn becomes its chosen forced move.  This applies even if both Pokémon had a choice item before this move was used.  If the first of the two Pokémon gains a choice item, it may select whatever choice move it wishes next turn.  Neither the user nor the target can recover its item with recycle.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: The user trades held items with the foe faster than the eye can follow.

name: Psyshield Bash
flavor_text: Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This may also raise the user’s defensive stats.

name: Night Slash
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: The user slashes the foe the instant an opportunity arises. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Karate Chop
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: Has a high criti­ cal hit ratio.

name: Safeguard
effect: Protects Pokémon on the user’s side of the field from major status effects and confusion for five turns.  Does not cancel existing ailments.  This effect remains even if the user leaves the field.  If yawn is used while this move is in effect, it will immediately fail.  defog used by an opponent will end this effect.  This effect does not prevent the confusion caused by outrage, petal dance, or thrash.
flavor_text: Prevents all status problems.

name: Solar Beam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.  During sunny day, the charge turn is skipped.  During hail, rain dance, or sandstorm, power is halved.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
flavor_text: 1st turn: Prepare 2nd turn: Attack

name: Vacuum Wave
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user whirls its fists to send a wave of pure vacuum at the foe. This move always goes first.

name: Overheat
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
flavor_text: Allows a full-power attack, but sharply lowers SP. ATK.

name: Bite
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: An attack that may cause flinching.

name: Fake Out
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Causes the target to flinch.  Can only be used on the user’s first turn after entering the field.
flavor_text: A 1st-turn, 1st-strike move that causes flinching.

name: Tar Shot
flavor_text: The user pours sticky tar over the target, lowering the target’s Speed stat. The target becomes weaker to Fire-type moves.

name: Thunder
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.  During rain dance, this move has 100% accuracy.  It also has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection of protect and detect.  During sunny day, this move has 50% accuracy.
flavor_text: An attack that may cause paralysis.

name: Night Daze
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: The user lets loose a pitch-black shock wave at its target. It may also lower the target’s accuracy.

name: Pound
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Pounds with fore­ legs or tail.

name: Thunder Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: An electric punch. It may paralyze.

name: Punishment
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power starts at 60 and is increased by 20 for every stage any of the target’s stats has been raised, capping at 200.  Accuracy and evasion modifiers do not increase this move’s power.
flavor_text: This attack’s power increases the more the foe has powered up with stat changes.

name: Mystical Power
flavor_text: The user strengthens itself with a mysterious power. If it excels in offense, its offensive stats are raised. If it excels in defense, its defensive stats are raised.

name: Extrasensory
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: Attacks with a peculiar power. May cause flinching.

name: Splash
effect: Does nothing.  This move cannot be used while gravity is in effect.
flavor_text: Has no effect whatsoever.

name: Dark Void
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: The foe is dragged into a world of total darkness that puts it to sleep.

name: Comet Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: Repeatedly punches 2-5 times.

name: Coaching
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user properly coaches its ally Pokémon, boosting their Attack and Defense stats.

name: Pursuit
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target attempts to switch out this turn before the user acts, this move hits the target before it leaves and has double power.  This effect can still hit a Pokémon that switches out when it has a substitute up or when an ally has used follow me.
flavor_text: Heavily strikes switching POKéMON.

name: Ice Hammer
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The user swings and hits with its strong, heavy fist. It lowers the user’s Speed, however.

name: Natures Madness
effect: Inflicts typeless damage equal to half the target’s remaining HP.
flavor_text: The user hits the target with the force of nature. It halves the target’s HP.

name: Focus Energy
effect: User’s critical hit rate is two levels higher until it leaves the field.  If the user has already used focus energy since entering the field, this move will fail.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.
flavor_text: Raises the criti­ cal hit ratio.

name: Double Iron Bash
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn.
flavor_text: The user rotates, centering the hex nut in its chest, and then strikes with its arms twice in a row. This may also make the target flinch.

name: Poison Fang
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to badly poison the target.
flavor_text: A sharp-fanged attack. May badly poison the foe.

name: Rising Voltage
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks with electric voltage rising from the ground. This move’s power doubles when the target is on Electric Terrain.

name: Ally Switch
effect: User switches position on the field with the friendly Pokémon opposite it.  If the user is in the middle position in a triple battle, or there are no other friendly Pokémon, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user teleports using a strange power and switches its place with one of its allies.

name: Gyro Ball
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the target’s current Speed compared to the user, given by `1 + 25 * target Speed / user Speed`, capped at 150.
flavor_text: The user tackles the foe with a high-speed spin. The slower the user, the greater the damage.

name: Secret Sword
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage calculation always uses the target’s Defense, regardless of this move’s damage class.
flavor_text: The user cuts with its long horn. The odd power contained in the horn does physical damage to the target.

name: Flower Trick
flavor_text: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

name: Detect
effect: No moves will hit the user for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.  If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail.  lock on, mind reader, and no guard provide a (100 – accuracy)% chance for moves to break through this move.  This does not apply to one-hit KO moves (fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold); those are always blocked by this move.  thunder during rain dance and blizzard during hail have a 30% chance to break through this move.  The following effects are not prevented by this move:  * acupressure from an ally * curse’s curse effect * Delayed damage from doom desire and future sight; however, these moves will be prevented if they are used this turn * feint, which will also end this move’s protection after it hits * imprison * perish song * shadow force * Moves that merely copy the user, such as transform or psych up  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: Evades attack that turn. It may fail.

name: Calm Mind
effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage each.
flavor_text: Raises SP. ATK and SP. DEF by focusing the mind.

name: Oblivion Wing
effect: Deals regular damage.  Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: The user absorbs its target’s HP. The user’s HP is restored by over half of the damage taken by the target.

name: Malignant Chain
flavor_text: The user pours toxins into the target by wrapping them in a toxic, corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.

name: Crush Grip
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power directly relates to the target’s relative remaining HP, given by `1 + 120 * current HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 121.
flavor_text: The foe is crushed with great force. The attack is more powerful the more HP the foe has left.

name: Accelerock
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user smashes into the target at high speed. This move always goes first.

name: Zen Headbutt
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user focuses its willpower to its head and rams the foe. It may also make the target flinch.

name: Spider Web
effect: The target cannot switch out normally.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This effect ends when the user leaves the field.  The target may still escape by using baton pass, u turn, or a shed shell.  Both the user and the target pass on this effect with baton pass.
flavor_text: Prevents fleeing or switching.

name: Sand Tomb
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.
flavor_text: Traps and hurts the foe in quicksand for 2 to 5 turns.

name: Seed Bomb
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user slams a barrage of hard- shelled seeds down on the foe from above.

name: Magnetic Flux
effect: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of all friendly Pokémon with plus or minus by one stage.
flavor_text: The user manipulates magnetic fields, which raises the Defense and Sp. Def stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus or Minus Ability.

name: Teleport
effect: Does nothing.  Wild battles end immediately.
flavor_text: A move for fleeing from battle.

name: Attract
effect: Causes the target to fall in love with the user, giving it a 50% chance to do nothing each turn.  If the user and target are the same gender, or either is genderless, this move will fail.  If either Pokémon leaves the field, this effect ends.
flavor_text: Makes the opposite gender infatuated.

name: Stone Axe
flavor_text: The user swings its stone axes at the target, aiming to land a critical hit. Stone splinters left behind by this attack continue to damage the target for several turns.

name: Wide Guard
effect: Moves with multiple targets will not hit friendly Pokémon for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: The user and its allies are protected from wide-ranging attacks for one turn. If used in succession, its chance of failing rises.

name: Jaw Lock
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) sets leech seed on the target.
flavor_text: This move prevents the user and the target from switching out until either of them faints. The effect goes away if either of the Pokémon leaves the field.

name: Toxic
effect: Badly poisons the target.  Never misses when used by a poison-type Pokémon.
flavor_text: A poison move with increasing damage.

name: Baton Pass
effect: User switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party.  Stat changes, confusion, and persistent move effects are passed along to the replacement Pokémon.  The following move effects are passed:  * aqua ring * both the user’s and target’s effect of block, mean look, and spider web * the curse effect of curse * embargo * focus energy or an activated lansat berry * gastro acid * ingrain * being sapped by leech seed * being targeted by lock on or mind reader * magnet rise * perish song’s counter * power trick * substitute; the doll’s HP is unchanged  The replacement Pokémon does not trigger effects that respond to Pokémon switching in.
flavor_text: Switches while keeping effects.

name: Steam Eruption
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The user immerses the target in superheated steam. This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: Fire Fang
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target and a separate $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user bites with flame-cloaked fangs. It may also make the foe flinch or sustain a burn.

name: Thunder Cage
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user traps the target in a cage of sparking electricity for four to five turns.

name: Rage Fist
flavor_text: The user converts its rage into energy to attack. The more times the user has been hit by attacks, the greater the move's power.

name: Flying Press
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  For the purposes of type effectiveness, this move is both fighting- and flying-type: its final effectiveness is determined by multiplying the effectiveness of each type against each of the target’s types.  For all other purposes, this move is pure Fighting-type.  If this move’s type is changed, its Fighting typing is overwritten, and its secondary type remains Flying.  If the target has used minimize since entering battle, this move has double power and will never miss.
flavor_text: The user dives down onto the target from the sky. This move is Fighting and Flying type simultaneously.

name: Twister
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make each target flinch.  If the target is under the effect of bounce, fly, or sky drop, this move will hit with double power.
flavor_text: Whips up a tornado to attack.

name: Acupressure
effect: Raises one of the target’s stats by two stages.  The raised stat is chosen at random from any stats that can be raised by two stages.  If no stat is eligible, this move will fail.  If the target has a substitute, this move will have no effect, even if the user is the target.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
flavor_text: The user applies pressure to stress points, sharply boosting one of its stats.

name: Conversion 2
effect: Changes the user’s type to a type either resistant or immune to the last damaging move that hit it.  The new type is selected at random and cannot be a type the user already is.  If there is no eligible new type, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user's type is made resistant.

name: Heat Wave
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: Exhales a hot breath on the foe. May inflict a burn.

name: Fire Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: A fiery punch. May cause a burn.

name: Flatter
effect: Raises the target’s Special Attack by one stage, then confuses it.
flavor_text: Confuses the foe, but raises its SP. ATK.

name: Heart Stamp
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user unleashes a vicious blow after its cute act makes the target less wary. It may also make the target flinch.

name: Luster Purge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: Attacks with a burst of light. May lower SP. DEF.

name: Jump Kick
effect: Inflicts regular damage. If this move misses, is blocked by protect or detect, or has no effect, the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP rounded down.  This move cannot be used while gravity is in effect.
flavor_text: May miss, damaging the user.

name: Sandsear Storm
flavor_text: The user attacks by wrapping the target in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This also leaves the target with a burn.

name: Waterfall
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: An aquatic charge attack.

name: Pay Day
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  After the battle ends, the winner receives five times the user’s level in extra money for each time this move was used.
flavor_text: Throws coins. Gets them back later.

name: Flail
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power varies inversely with the user’s proportional remaining HP.  64 * current HP / max HP | Power -----------------------: | ----:  0– 1                    |  200  2– 5                    |  150  6–12                    |  100 13–21                    |   80 22–42                    |   40 43–64                    |   20
flavor_text: Stronger if the user's HP is low.

name: Lock On
effect: If the user targets the same target again before the end of the next turn, the move it uses is guaranteed to hit.  This move itself also ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  One-hit KO moves are also guaranteed to hit, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  This effect also allows the user to hit Pokémon that are off the field due to moves such as dig or fly.  If the target uses detect or protect while under the effect of this move, the user is not guaranteed to hit, but has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.
flavor_text: Ensures the next attack will hit.

name: Eruption
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the user’s remaining HP and is given by `150 * HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 150 when the user has full HP.
flavor_text: The higher the user’s HP, the more damage caused.

name: Zing Zap
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: A strong electric blast crashes down on the target, giving it an electric shock. This may also make the target flinch.

name: Giga Impact
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
flavor_text: The user charges at the foe using every bit of its power. The user must rest on the next turn.

name: Metal Claw
effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Attack one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may up user's ATTACK.

name: Poison Powder
effect: Poisons the target.
flavor_text: A move that may poison the foe.

name: Breaking Swipe
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user swings its tough tail wildly and attacks opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Attack stats.

name: Peck
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Jabs the foe with a beak, etc.

name: Assurance
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target takes damage this turn for any reason before this move is used, this move has double power.
flavor_text: If the foe has already taken some damage in the same turn, this attack’s power is doubled.

name: Flame Burst
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If this move successfully hits the target, any Pokémon adjacent to the target are damaged for 1/16 their max HP.
flavor_text: The user attacks the target with a bursting flame. The bursting flame damages Pokémon next to the target as well.

name: Water Spout
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the user’s remaining HP and is given by `150 * HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 150 when the user has full HP.
flavor_text: Inflicts more damage if the user’s HP is high.

name: Psychic Terrain
effect: Changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain for 5 turns.  Overrides electric terrain, grassy terrain, and misty terrain.  All Pokémon on the ground are immune to moves with priority greater than 0.  (Moves that target the field rather than individual Pokémon, such as spikes, are not affected.)  Additionally, when a Pokémon on the ground uses a psychic-type move, that move’s power is increased to 1.5×.  If a Pokémon is holding a Terrain Extender when creating Psychic Terrain (by any means), the effect lasts for 8 turns instead of 5.
flavor_text: This protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and powers up Psychic-type moves for five turns.

name: Ice Shard
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user flash freezes chunks of ice and hurls them. This move always goes first.

name: Phantom Force
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User vanishes for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn.  This move ignores the effects of detect and protect.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
flavor_text: The user vanishes somewhere, then strikes the target on the next turn. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

name: Barb Barrage
flavor_text: The user launches countless toxic barbs to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

name: Minimize
effect: Raises the user’s evasion by two stages.  stomp and steamroller have double power against Pokémon that have used this move since entering the field.
flavor_text: Heightens evasive­ ness.

name: Headbutt
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: An attack that may make foe flinch.

name: Odor Sleuth
effect: Resets the target’s evasion to normal and prevents any further boosting until the target leaves the field.  A ghost under this effect takes normal damage from normal and fighting moves.  This move itself ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
flavor_text: Negates the foe’s efforts to heighten evasiveness.

name: Fling
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power and type are determined by the user’s held item.  The item is consumed.  If the user is not holding an item, or its item has no set type and power, this move will fail.  This move ignores sticky hold.  If the user is under the effect of embargo, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user flings its held item at the foe to attack. Its power and effects depend on the item.

name: Water Pulse
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: Attacks with ultrasonic waves. May confuse the foe

name: Leaf Tornado
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: The user attacks its target by encircling it in sharp leaves. This attack may also lower the target’s accuracy.

name: Snowscape
flavor_text: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

name: Needle Arm
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: Attacks with thorny arms. May cause flinching.

name: Pin Missile
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: Fires pins that strike 2-5 times.

name: Steamroller
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.  Power is doubled against Pokémon that have used minimize since entering the field.
flavor_text: The user crushes its targets by rolling over them with its rolled-up body. This attack may make the target flinch.

name: Shelter
flavor_text: The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, raising its defensive stats. Incoming moves also become more likely to miss.

name: Fiery Dance
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: Cloaked in flames, the user dances and flaps its wings. It may also raise the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Autotomize
effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.  Halves the user’s weight; this effect does not stack.
flavor_text: The user sheds part of its body to make itself lighter and sharply raise its Speed stat.

name: Photon Geyser
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks a target with a pillar of light. This move inflicts Attack or Sp. Atk damage—whichever stat is higher for the user.

name: Gust
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is under the effect of bounce, fly, or sky drop, this move will hit with double power.
flavor_text: Whips up a strong gust of wind.

name: Hyper Beam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
flavor_text: 1st turn: Attack 2nd turn: Rest

name: Camouflage
effect: User’s type changes according to the terrain.  Terrain        | New type -------------- | -------------- Building       | normal Cave           | rock Desert         | ground Grass          | grass Mountain       | rock Ocean          | water Pond           | water Road           | ground Snow           | ice Tall grass     | grass  In Pokémon Battle Revolution:  Terrain        | New type -------------- | -------------- Courtyard      | normal Crystal        | rock Gateway        | water Magma          | rock Main Street    | normal Neon           | normal Stargazer      | rock Sunny Park     | grass Sunset         | ground Waterfall      | grass
flavor_text: Alters the POKéMON’s type depending on the location.

name: Rock Slide
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: An attack that may cause flinching.

name: Water Gun
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Squirts water to attack.

name: Entrainment
effect: Changes the target’s ability to match the user’s.  This effect ends when the target leaves battle.
flavor_text: The user dances with an odd rhythm that compels the target to mimic it, making the target’s Ability the same as the user’s.

name: Mirror Coat
effect: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a special move this turn.  Inflicts twice the damage that move did to the user.  If there is no eligible target, this move will fail.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: Counters a SPCL. ATK. move double.

name: Power Trick
effect: The user’s original Attack and Defense are swapped.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.
flavor_text: The user employs its psychic power to switch its Attack stat with its Defense stat.

name: Precipice Blades
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by manifesting the power of the land in fearsome blades of stone.

name: Endure
effect: The user’s HP cannot be lowered below 1 by any means for the remainder of this turn.  If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: Always leaves at least 1HP.

name: Grass Whistle
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: Lulls the foe into sleep with a pleasant melody.

name: Ice Fang
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target and a separate $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user bites with cold-infused fangs. It may also make the foe flinch or freeze.

name: Venom Drench
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by one stage if it is poisoned.
flavor_text: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

name: Confide
effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Psybeam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: An attack that may confuse the foe.

name: Dream Eater
effect: Fails if not used on a sleeping Pokémon.  Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: Steals HP from a sleeping victim.

name: Dazzling Gleam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

name: Fillet Away
flavor_text: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

name: Ion Deluge
effect: Changes all Pokémon’s normal moves to electric moves for the rest of the turn.
flavor_text: The user disperses electrically charged particles, which changes Normal-type moves to Electric-type moves.

name: Blast Burn
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
flavor_text: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

name: Bulk Up
effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage each.
flavor_text: Bulks up the body to boost both ATTACK and DEFENSE.

name: Sleep Powder
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: May cause the foe to fall asleep.

name: Trump Card
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is determined by the PP remaining for this move, after its PP cost is deducted.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  PP remaining | Power ------------ | ----: 4 or more    |    40 3            |    50 2            |    60 1            |    80 0            |   200  If this move is activated by another move, the activating move’s PP is used to calculate power.
flavor_text: The fewer PP this move has, the more power it has for attack.

name: Snarl
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user yells as if it is ranting about something, making the target’s Sp. Atk stat decrease.

name: Magical Leaf
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
flavor_text: Attacks with a strange leaf that cannot be evaded.

name: Telekinesis
effect: For three turns (including this one), moves used against the target have 100% accuracy, but the target is immune to ground damage.  Accuracy of one-hit KO moves is exempt from this effect.  This effect is removed by gravity.  If Gravity is already in effect, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user makes the target float with its psychic power. The target is easier to hit for three turns.

name: Aqua Ring
effect: Restores 1/16 of the user’s max HP at the end of each turn.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.
flavor_text: The user envelops itself in a veil made of water. It regains some HP on every turn.

name: Toxic Thread
effect: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The user shoots poisonous threads to poison the target and lower the target’s Speed stat.

name: Power Up Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: Striking opponents over and over makes the user’s fists harder. Hitting a target raises the Attack stat.

name: Glaive Rush
flavor_text: The user throws its entire body into a reckless charge. After this move is used, attacks on the user cannot miss and will inflict double damage until the user’s next turn.

name: Ingrain
effect: Prevents the user from switching out.  User regains 1/16 of its max HP at the end of every turn.  If the user was immune to ground attacks, it will now take normal damage from them.  roar and whirlwind will not affect the user.  The user cannot use magnet rise.  The user may still use u turn to leave the field.  This effect can be passed with baton pass.
flavor_text: Lays roots that restore HP. The user can’t switch out.

name: Horn Drill
effect: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.  Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, endure still prevents the target from fainting.  The effects of lock on, mind reader, and no guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  However, they will not give this move a chance to break through detect or protect.
flavor_text: A one-hit KO, drill attack.

name: Psych Up
effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
flavor_text: Copies the foe's stat changes.

name: Triple Axel
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.

name: Discharge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: A flare of electricity is loosed to strike all Pokémon in battle. It may also cause paralysis.

name: Perish Song
effect: Every Pokémon is given a counter that starts at 3 and decreases by 1 at the end of every turn, including this one.  When a Pokémon’s counter reaches zero, that Pokémon faints.  A Pokémon that leaves the field will lose its counter; its replacement does not inherit the effect, and other Pokémon’s counters remain.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
flavor_text: Both user and foe faint in 3 turns.

name: Echoed Voice
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If any friendly Pokémon used this move earlier this turn or on the previous turn, that use’s power is added to this move’s power, to a maximum of 200.
flavor_text: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used every turn, it does greater damage.

name: Sludge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: An attack that may poison the foe.

name: Confuse Ray
effect: Confuses the target.
flavor_text: A move that causes confusion.

name: Superpower
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage each.
flavor_text: Boosts strength sharply, but lowers abilities.

name: Power Gem
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

name: Guard Split
effect: Averages the user’s unmodified Defense with the target’s unmodified Defense; the value becomes the unmodified Defense for both Pokémon. Unmodified Special Defense is averaged the same way.
flavor_text: The user employs its psychic power to average its Defense and Sp. Def stats with those of its target’s.

name: Psychic
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may lower SPCL.DEF.

name: Zap Cannon
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: An attack that always paralyzes.

name: Bide
effect: User waits for two turns.  On the second turn, the user inflicts twice the damage it accumulated on the last Pokémon to hit it.  Damage inflicted is typeless.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
flavor_text: Waits 2-3 turns & hits back double.

name: Captivate
effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.  If the user and target are the same gender, or either is genderless, this move will fail.
flavor_text: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

name: Powder Snow
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
flavor_text: An attack that may cause freezing.

name: Triple Dive
flavor_text: The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.

name: Tearful Look
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.
flavor_text: The user gets teary eyed to make the target lose its combative spirit. This lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

name: Glaciate
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The user attacks by blowing freezing cold air at opposing Pokémon. This attack reduces the targets’ Speed stat.

name: Follow Me
effect: Until the end of this turn, any moves that opposing Pokémon target solely at the user’s ally will instead target the user.  If both Pokémon on the same side of the field use this move on the same turn, the Pokémon that uses it last will become the target.  This effect takes priority over lightning rod and storm drain.  If the user’s ally switches out, opposing Pokémon may still hit it with pursuit.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: Draws attention to make foes attack only the user.

name: Petal Blizzard
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and attacks everything around it.

name: Natural Gift
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power and type are determined by the user’s held berry.  The berry is consumed.  If the user is not holding a berry, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

name: Force Palm
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with a shock wave. It may also leave the target paralyzed.

name: Baneful Bunker
effect: Grants the user protection for the rest of the turn.  If a Pokémon attempts to use a move that makes contact with the user, that Pokémon will be poisoned.  This move’s chance of success halves every time it’s used consecutively with any other protection move.
flavor_text: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also poisons any attacker that makes direct contact.

name: Will O Wisp
effect: Burns the target.
flavor_text: Inflicts a burn on the foe with intense fire.

name: Self Destruct
effect: User faints, even if the attack fails or misses.  Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Powerful but makes the user faint.

name: Psycho Shift
effect: If the user has a major status effect and the target does not, the user’s status is transferred to the target.
flavor_text: Using its psychic power of suggestion, the user transfers its status problems to the target.

name: Vital Throw
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
flavor_text: A 2nd-strike move that never misses.

name: Rock Throw
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Drops rocks on the enemy.

name: Wildbolt Storm
flavor_text: The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

name: Reversal
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power varies inversely with the user’s proportional remaining HP.  64 * current HP / max HP | Power -----------------------: | ----:  0– 1                    |  200  2– 5                    |  150  6–12                    |  100 13–21                    |   80 22–42                    |   40 43–64                    |   20
flavor_text: Stronger if the user's HP is low.

name: Dark Pulse
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. It may also make the target flinch.

name: Stored Power
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is increased by 100% its original value for every stage any of the user’s stats have been raised.  Accuracy, evasion, and lowered stats do not affect this move’s power.  For a Pokémon with all five stats modified to +6, this move’s power is 31×.
flavor_text: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user’s stats are raised, the greater the damage.

name: Revenge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target damaged the user this turn and was the last to do so, this move has double power.  pain split does not count as damaging the user.
flavor_text: An attack that gains power if injured by the foe.

name: Core Enforcer
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target has already moved this turn, its ability is nullified.
flavor_text: If the Pokémon the user has inflicted damage on have already used their moves, this move eliminates the effect of the target’s Ability.

name: Burning Bulwark
flavor_text: The user's intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.

name: Aqua Jet
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user lunges at the foe at a speed that makes it almost invisible. It is sure to strike first.

name: Geomancy
effect: Takes one turn to charge, then raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by two stages.
flavor_text: The user absorbs energy and sharply raises its Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats on the next turn.

name: Sing
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: May cause the foe to fall asleep.

name: Power Swap
effect: User swaps its Attack and Special Attack stat modifiers modifiers with the target.
flavor_text: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Attack and Sp. Atk with the foe.

name: Air Slash
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. It may also make the target flinch.

name: High Jump Kick
effect: Inflicts regular damage. If this move misses, is blocked by protect or detect, or has no effect, the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP rounded down.  This move cannot be used while gravity is in effect.
flavor_text: May miss and hurt the user.

name: Flower Shield
effect: Raises the Defense of all grass Pokémon in battle.
flavor_text: The user raises the Defense stat of all Grass-type Pokémon in battle with a mysterious power.

name: Double Hit
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn.
flavor_text: The user slams the foe with a tail, etc. The target is hit twice in a row.

name: Hard Press
flavor_text: The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

name: Disable
effect: Disables the target’s last used move, preventing its use for 4–7 turns, selected at random, or until the target leaves the field.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed,  if its last used move has 0 PP remaining, or if it already has a move disabled, this move will fail.
flavor_text: Disables the foe's most recent move.

name: Body Press
flavor_text: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user’s Defense, the more damage it can inflict on the target.

name: Foul Play
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage is calculated using the target’s attacking stat rather than the user’s.
flavor_text: The user turns the target’s power against it. The higher the target’s Attack stat, the greater the damage.

name: Mist
effect: Pokémon on the user’s side of the field are immune to stat-lowering effects for five turns.  guard swap, heart swap, and power swap may still be used.  defog used by an opponent will end this effect.
flavor_text: Prevents stat reduction.

name: Sunny Day
effect: Changes the weather to sunshine for five turns, during which fire moves inflict 50% extra damage, and water moves inflict half damage.  If the user is holding heat rock, this effect lasts for eight turns.  Pokémon cannot become frozen.  thunder has 50% accuracy.  solar beam skips its charge turn.  moonlight, morning sun, and synthesis heal 2/3 of the user’s max HP.  Pokémon with chlorophyll have doubled original Speed.  Pokémon with forecast become fire.  Pokémon with leaf guard are not affected by major status effects.  Pokémon with flower gift change form; every Pokémon on their side of the field have their original Attack and Special Attack increased by 50%.  Pokémon with dry skin lose 1/8 max HP at the end of each turn.  Pokémon with solar power have their original Special Attack raised by 50% but lose 1/8 their max HP at the end of each turn.
flavor_text: Boosts fire-type moves for 5 turns.

name: Aura Wheel
flavor_text: Morpeko attacks and raises its Speed with the energy stored in its cheeks. This move’s type changes depending on the user’s form.

name: Kinesis
effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: Reduces the foe's accuracy.

name: Aeroblast
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: Has a high criti­ cal hit ratio.

name: Obstruct
flavor_text: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession. Direct contact harshly lowers the attacker’s Defense stat.

name: Worry Seed
effect: Changes the target’s ability to insomnia.  If the target’s ability is truant or multitype, this move will fail.
flavor_text: A seed that causes worry is planted on the foe. It prevents sleep by making its ability Insomnia.

name: Growl
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: Reduces the foe's ATTACK.

flavor_text: The user hides in the target’s shadow, steals the target’s stat boosts, and then attacks.

name: Tail Slap
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. It hits the target two to five times in a row.

name: Ancient Power
effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise all of the user’s stats one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may raise all stats.

name: Dragon Dance
effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Speed by one stage each.
flavor_text: A mystical dance that ups ATTACK and SPEED.

name: Rock Smash
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may lower DEFENSE.

name: Powder
effect: Explodes if the target uses a fire move this turn, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP and preventing the move.
flavor_text: The user covers the target in a powder that explodes and damages the target if it uses a Fire-type move.

name: Frenzy Plant
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
flavor_text: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

name: Dragon Energy
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Converting its life-force into power, the user attacks opposing Pokémon. The lower the user’s HP, the lower the move’s power.

name: Acid
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may lower DEFENSE.

name: Hydro Pump
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: A powerful water- type attack.

name: Prismatic Laser
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
flavor_text: The user shoots powerful lasers using the power of a prism. The user can’t move on the next turn.

name: Alluring Voice
flavor_text: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

name: Vine Whip
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Whips the foe with slender vines.

name: Coil
effect: Raises the user’s Attack, Defense, and accuracy by one stage each.
flavor_text: The user coils up and concentrates. This raises its Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy.

name: Dragon Tail
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon, selected at random.  If the target is under the effect of ingrain or suction cups, or it has a substitute, or its Trainer has no more usable Pokémon, it will not be switched out.  If the target is a wild Pokémon, the battle ends instead.
flavor_text: The user knocks away the target and drags out another Pokémon in its party. In the wild, the battle ends.

name: Lunge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

name: Sonic Boom
effect: Inflicts exactly 20 damage.
flavor_text: Always inflicts 20HP damage.

name: Simple Beam
effect: Changes the target’s ability to simple.
flavor_text: The user’s mysterious psychic wave changes the target’s Ability to Simple.

name: Guillotine
effect: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.  Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, endure still prevents the target from fainting.  The effects of lock on, mind reader, and no guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  However, they will not give this move a chance to break through detect or protect.
flavor_text: A one-hit KO, pincer attack.

name: Arm Thrust
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: Straight-arm punches that strike the foe 2 to 5 times.

name: Diamond Storm
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Defense by two stages for each target hit.
flavor_text: The user whips up a storm of diamonds to damage opposing Pokémon. This may also raise the user’s Defense stat.

name: Shadow Ball
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may lower SPCL.DEF.

name: Stuff Cheeks
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) removes major status effects from every Pokémon in the user’s party.
flavor_text: The user eats its held Berry, then sharply raises its Defense stat.

name: Magma Storm
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.
flavor_text: The foe becomes trapped within a maelstrom of fire that rages for two to five turns.

name: Tackle
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: A full-body charge attack.

name: Drain Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: An energy-draining punch. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

name: Wing Attack
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Strikes the target with wings.

name: Throat Chop
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Silences the target for two turns, preventing it from using any sound-based moves.
flavor_text: The user attacks the target’s throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using moves that emit sound for two turns.

name: Smelling Salts
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is paralyzed, this move has double power, and the target is cured of its paralysis.
flavor_text: Powerful against paralyzed foes, but also heals them.

name: Raging Bull
flavor_text: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

name: Fire Spin
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.
flavor_text: Traps foe in fire for 2-5 turns.

name: Earthquake
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is in the first turn of dig, this move will hit with double power.
flavor_text: Tough but useless vs. flying foes.

name: Soak
effect: Changes the target to pure water-type until it leaves the field.  If the target has multitype, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user shoots a torrent of water at the target and changes the target’s type to Water.

name: Whirlwind
effect: Switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon selected at random.  Wild battles end immediately.  Doesn’t affect Pokémon with suction cups or under the effect of ingrain.
flavor_text: Blows away the foe & ends battle.

name: Infestation
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.
flavor_text: The target is infested and attacked for four to five turns. The target can’t flee during this time.

name: Psyshock
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage calculation always uses the target’s Defense, regardless of this move’s damage class.
flavor_text: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

name: Milk Drink
effect: Heals the user for half its max HP.
flavor_text: Restores HP by 1/2 the max HP.

name: Eternabeam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
flavor_text: This is Eternatus’s most powerful attack in its original form. The user can’t move on the next turn.

name: Trick
effect: User and target permanently swap held items.  Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything.  If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail.  If either Pokémon has multitype or sticky hold, this move will fail.  If this move results in a Pokémon obtaining choice band, choice scarf, or choice specs, and that Pokémon was the latter of the pair to move this turn, then the move it used this turn becomes its chosen forced move.  This applies even if both Pokémon had a choice item before this move was used.  If the first of the two Pokémon gains a choice item, it may select whatever choice move it wishes next turn.  Neither the user nor the target can recover its item with recycle.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: Tricks the foe into trading held items.

name: Iron Defense
effect: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: Hardens the body’s surface to sharply raise DEFENSE.

name: Blaze Kick
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move. Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: A kick with a high critical- hit ratio. May cause a burn.

name: Me First
effect: If the target has selected a damaging move this turn, the user will copy that move and use it against the target, with a 50% increase in power.  If the target moves before the user, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.
flavor_text: The user tries to cut ahead of the foe to steal and use the foe’s intended move with greater power.

name: Thousand Arrows
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Grounds the target until it leaves battle.  Ignores levitation effects and the immunity of flying-type Pokémon.
flavor_text: This move also hits opposing Pokémon that are in the air. Those Pokémon are knocked down to the ground.

name: Horn Attack
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: An attack using a horn to jab.

name: Dragon Ascent
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.
flavor_text: After soaring upward, the user attacks its target by dropping out of the sky at high speeds, although it lowers its own Defense and Sp. Def in the process.

name: Spin Out
flavor_text: The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.

name: Heal Bell
effect: Removes major status effects and confusion from every Pokémon in the user’s party.
flavor_text: Eliminates all status problems.

name: Wish
effect: At the end of the next turn, user will be healed for half its max HP.  If the user is switched out, its replacement will be healed instead for half of the user’s max HP.  If the user faints or is forcefully switched by roar or whirlwind, this effect will not activate.
flavor_text: A wish that restores HP. It takes time to work.

name: Fusion Flare
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If a friendly Pokémon used fusion bolt earlier this turn, this move has double power.
flavor_text: The user brings down a giant flame. This attack does greater damage when influenced by an enormous thunderbolt.

name: Torch Song
flavor_text: The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

name: Scald
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. It may also leave the target with a burn.

name: Struggle Bug
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: While resisting, the user attacks the opposing Pokémon. The targets’ Sp. Atk stat is reduced.

name: Cotton Spore
effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
flavor_text: Sharply reduces the foe's SPEED.

name: Wring Out
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power directly relates to the target’s relative remaining HP, given by `1 + 120 * current HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 121.
flavor_text: The user powerfully wrings the foe. The more HP the foe has, the greater this attack’s power.

name: Uproar
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to use this move for 2–5 turns, selected at random.  All Pokémon on the field wake up, and none can fall to sleep until the lock-in ends.  Pokémon cannot use rest during this effect.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
flavor_text: Causes an uproar for 2 to 5 turns and prevents sleep.

name: Volt Tackle
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: A life-risking tackle that slightly hurts the user.

name: Baby Doll Eyes
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user stares at the target with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers its Attack stat. This move always goes first.

name: Defog
effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.  Clears away fog.  Removes the effects of mist, light screen, reflect, safeguard, spikes, stealth rock, and toxic spikes from the target’s side of the field.  If the target is protected by mist, it will prevent the evasion change, then be removed by this move.
flavor_text: Obstacles are moved, reducing the foe’s evasion stat. It can also be used to clear deep fog, etc.

name: Branch Poke
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks the target by poking it with a sharply pointed branch.

name: High Horsepower
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

name: Flame Wheel
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.  Frozen Pokémon may use this move, in which case they will thaw.
flavor_text: An attack that may cause a burn.

name: Life Dew
flavor_text: The user scatters mysterious water around and restores the HP of itself and its ally Pokémon in the battle.

name: Wild Charge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
flavor_text: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. It also damages the user a little.

name: Pain Split
effect: Changes the user’s and target’s remaining HP to the average of their current remaining HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This effect does not count as inflicting damage for other moves and effects that respond to damage taken.  This effect fails against a substitute.
flavor_text: Adds user & foe's HPs. Shares total.

name: Gear Up
effect: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all friendly Pokémon with plus or minus by one stage.
flavor_text: The user engages its gears to raise the Attack and Sp. Atk stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus or Minus Ability.

name: Dynamax Cannon
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) sets light screen on the user’s side of the field.
flavor_text: The user unleashes a strong beam from its core. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.

name: Icy Wind
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: An icy attack that lowers SPEED.

name: Mirror Move
effect: Uses the last move targeted at the user by a Pokémon still on the field.  A move counts as targeting the user even if it hit multiple Pokémon, as long as the user was one of them; however, moves targeting the field itself do not count.  If the user has not been targeted by an appropriate move since entering the field, or if no Pokémon that targeted the user remains on the field, this move will fail.  Moves that failed, missed, had no effect, or were blocked are still copied.  Assist moves, time-delayed moves, “meta” moves that operate on other moves/Pokémon/abilities, and some other special moves cannot be copied and are ignored; if the last move to hit the user was such a move, the previous move will be used instead.  The full list of ignored moves is: acid armor, acupressure, after you, agility, ally switch, amnesia, aqua ring, aromatherapy, aromatic mist, assist, autotomize, barrier, baton pass, belch, belly drum, bide, bulk up, calm mind, camouflage, celebrate, charge, coil, conversion, conversion 2, copycat, cosmic power, cotton guard, counter, crafty shield, curse, defend order, defense curl, destiny bond, detect, doom desire, double team, dragon dance, electric terrain, endure, final gambit, flower shield, focus energy, focus punch, follow me, future sight, geomancy, grassy terrain, gravity, growth, grudge, guard split, hail, happy hour, harden, haze, heal bell, heal order, heal pulse, healing wish, helping hand, hold hands, hone claws, howl, imprison, ingrain, ion deluge, iron defense, kings shield, light screen, lucky chant, lunar dance, magic coat, magnet rise, magnetic flux, mat block, me first, meditate, metronome, milk drink, mimic, minimize, mirror coat, mirror move, mist, misty terrain, moonlight, morning sun, mud sport, nasty plot, nature power, perish song, power split, power trick, protect, psych up, quick guard, quiver dance, rage powder, rain dance, recover, recycle, reflect, reflect type, refresh, rest, rock polish, role play, roost, rototiller, safeguard, sandstorm, shadow blast, shadow bolt, shadow half, shadow rush, shadow shed, shadow sky, shadow storm, shadow wave, sharpen, shell smash, shift gear, sketch, slack off, sleep talk, snatch, soft boiled, spikes, spiky shield, spit up, splash, stealth rock, sticky web, stockpile, struggle, substitute, sunny day, swallow, swords dance, synthesis, tail glow, tailwind, teleport, toxic spikes, transform, water sport, wide guard, wish, withdraw and work up.  This move cannot be selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk, nor forced by encore.
flavor_text: Counters with the same move.

name: Trop Kick
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user lands an intense kick of tropical origins on the target. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

name: Trick Room
effect: For five turns (including this one), slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.  Move priority is not affected.  Using this move when its effect is already active will end the effect.  Pokémon holding full incense, lagging tail, or quick claw and Pokémon with stall ignore this effect.
flavor_text: The user creates a bizarre area in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.

name: Cut
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Cuts using claws, scythes, etc.

name: Moonblast
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Hammer Arm
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The user swings and hits with its strong and heavy fist. It lowers the user’s Speed, however.

name: Rock Wrecker
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
flavor_text: The user launches a huge boulder at the foe to attack. It must rest on the next turn, however.

name: Transform
effect: User copies the target’s species, weight, type, ability, calculated stats (except HP), and moves.  Copied moves will all have 5 PP remaining.  IVs are copied for the purposes of hidden power, but stats are not recalculated.  choice band, choice scarf, and choice specs stay in effect, and the user must select a new move.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor forced by encore.
flavor_text: The user assumes the foe's guise.

name: Clangorous Soul
flavor_text: The user raises all its stats by using some of its HP.

name: Defense Curl
effect: Raises user’s Defense by one stage.  After this move is used, the power of ice ball and rollout are doubled until the user leaves the field.
flavor_text: Heightens the user's DEFENSE.

name: Quick Guard
effect: Moves with priority greater than 0 will not hit friendly Pokémon for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves. If used in succession, its chance of failing rises.

name: Steel Wing
effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a 10% chance to raise the user’s Defense one stage.
flavor_text: Stiff wings strike the foe.

name: Dragon Rage
effect: Inflicts exactly 40 damage.
flavor_text: Always inflicts 40HP damage.

name: Recycle
effect: User recovers the last item consumed by the user or a Pokémon in its position on the field.  The item must be used again before it can be recovered by this move again.  If the user is holding an item, this move fails.  Items taken or given away by covet, knock off, switcheroo, thief, or trick may not be recovered.
flavor_text: Recycles a used item for one more use.

name: Smack Down
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Removes the target’s immunity to ground-type damage.  This effect removes any existing Ground immunity due to levitate, magnet rise, or telekinesis, and causes the target’s flying type to be ignored when it takes Ground damage.  If the target isn’t immune to Ground damage, this move will fail.  This move can hit Pokémon under the effect of bounce, fly, or sky drop, and ends the effect of Bounce or Fly.
flavor_text: The user throws a stone or projectile to attack an opponent. A flying Pokémon will fall to the ground when hit.

name: Jet Punch
flavor_text: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

name: Feint Attack
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
flavor_text: An attack that never misses.

name: Draining Kiss
effect: Deals regular damage.  Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: The user steals the target’s energy with a kiss. The user’s HP is restored by over half of the damage taken by the target.

name: Play Rough
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user plays rough with the target and attacks it. This may also lower the target’s Attack stat.

name: Sketch
effect: Permanently replaces itself with the target’s last used move.  If that move is chatter or struggle, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mimic or mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome, nor forced by encore.
flavor_text: Copies the foe's move permanently.

name: Spite
effect: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, or if its last used move has 0 PP remaining, this move will fail.
flavor_text: Cuts the PP of the foe's last move.

name: Crunch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may lower SPCL.DEF.

name: Fleur Cannon
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
flavor_text: The user unleashes a strong beam. The attack’s recoil harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Acid Spray
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: The user spits fluid that works to melt the target. This harshly reduces the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: Thief
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is holding an item and the user is not, the user will permanently take the item.  Damage is still inflicted if an item cannot be taken.  Pokémon with sticky hold or multitype are immune to the item theft effect.  The target cannot recover its item with recycle.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: While attacking, it may steal the foe’s held item.

name: Population Bomb
flavor_text: The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.

name: Psystrike
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage calculation always uses the target’s Defense, regardless of this move’s damage class.
flavor_text: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

name: Supersonic
effect: Confuses the target.
flavor_text: Sound waves that cause confusion.

name: Dizzy Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: An attack that may cause confusion.

name: Supercell Slam
flavor_text: The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

name: Noble Roar
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: Letting out a noble roar, the user intimidates the target and lowers its Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

name: Giga Drain
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: Steals 1/2 of the damage inflicted.

name: Water Sport
effect: fire moves inflict half damage, regardless of target.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.
flavor_text: The user becomes soaked to raise resistance to fire.

name: Meteor Mash
effect: Inflicts regular damage. Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Attack one stage.
flavor_text: Fires a meteor-like punch. May raise ATTACK.

name: Copycat
effect: Uses the last move that was used successfully by any Pokémon, including the user.  This move cannot copy itself, nor roar nor whirlwind.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.
flavor_text: The user mimics the move used immediately before it. The move fails if no other move has been used yet.

name: Outrage
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.  safeguard does not protect against the confusion from this move.
flavor_text: Works 2-3 turns and confuses user.

name: Corrosive Gas
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user surrounds everything around it with highly acidic gas and melts away items they hold.

name: Trailblaze
flavor_text: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

name: Lumina Crash
flavor_text: The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

name: Ice Beam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
flavor_text: An attack that may freeze the foe.

name: Bubble Beam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may lower SPEED.

name: Searing Shot
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: An inferno of scarlet flames torches everything around the user. It may leave targets with a burn.

name: Body Slam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: An attack that may cause paralysis.

name: Belly Drum
effect: User pays half its max HP to raise its Attack to +6 stages.  If the user cannot pay the HP cost, this move will fail.
flavor_text: Reduces own HP to maximize ATTACK.

name: Round
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If round has already been used this turn, this move’s power is doubled.  After this move is used, any other Pokémon using it this turn will immediately do so (in the order they would otherwise act), regardless of Speed or priority.  Pokémon using other moves will then continue to act as usual.
flavor_text: The user attacks the target with a song. Others can join in the Round and make the attack do greater damage.

name: Tera Blast
flavor_text: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

name: Sucker Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target has not selected a damaging move this turn, or if the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail.  This move is not affected by iron fist.
flavor_text: This move enables the user to attack first. It fails if the foe is not readying an attack, however.

name: Bonemerang
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn.
flavor_text: An attack that strikes twice.

name: Magnet Rise
