effect: For five turns, the user is immune to ground moves.  If the user is under the effect of ingrain or has levitate, this move will fail.  This effect is temporarily disabled by and cannot be used during gravity.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.
flavor_text: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

name: After You
effect: The target will act next this turn, regardless of Speed or move priority. If the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.

name: Leaf Blade
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: Slashes with a sharp leaf. High critical-hit ratio.

name: Spike Cannon
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: Fires spikes to hit 2-5 times.

name: Lands Wrath
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user gathers the energy of the land and focuses that power on opposing Pokémon to damage them.

name: Destiny Bond
effect: If the user faints before its next move, the Pokémon that fainted it will automatically faint.  End-of-turn damage is ignored.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: The foe faints if the user does.

name: Nuzzle
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: The user attacks by nuzzling its electrified cheeks against the target. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

name: Stun Spore
effect: Paralyzes the target.
flavor_text: A move that may paralyze the foe.

name: Focus Blast
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

name: Thunder Shock
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: An electrical attack that may paralyze the foe.

name: Slash
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: Has a high criti­ cal hit ratio.

name: Helping Hand
effect: Boosts the power of the target’s moves by 50% until the end of this turn.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: A move that boosts the power of the ally’s attack in a Double Battle.

name: Poison Gas
effect: Poisons the target.
flavor_text: A move that may poison the foe.

name: Shadow Sneak
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user extends its shadow and attacks the foe from behind. This move always goes first.

name: Blizzard
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.  During hail, this move has 100% accuracy.  It also has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection of protect and detect.
flavor_text: An attack that may freeze the foe.

name: Swift
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
flavor_text: Sprays star-shaped rays that never miss.

name: Roost
effect: Heals the user for half its max HP.  If the user is flying, its flying type is ignored until the end of this turn.
flavor_text: The user lands and rests its body. It restores the user’s HP by up to half of its max HP.

name: Torment
effect: Prevents the target from attempting to use the same move twice in a row.  When the target leaves the field, this effect ends.  If the target is forced to attempt a repeated move due to choice band, choice scarf, choice specs, disable, encore, taunt, only having PP remaining for one move, or any other effect, the target will use struggle instead.  The target is then free to use the forced move next turn, as it didn’t use that move this turn.
flavor_text: Torments the foe and stops successive use of a move.

name: Conversion
effect: User’s type changes to the type of one of its moves, selected at random.  hidden power and weather ball are treated as normal.  Only moves with a different type are eligible, and curse is never eligible.  If the user has no suitable moves, this move will fail.
flavor_text: Change user's type to a move's type.

name: Heart Swap
effect: User swaps its stat modifiers with the target.
flavor_text: The user employs its psychic power to switch stat changes with the foe.

name: Heat Crash
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  The greater the user’s weight compared to the target’s, the higher power this move has, to a maximum of 120.  User’s weight                    | Power -------------------------------- | ----: Up to 2× the target’s weight     |    40 Up to 3× the target’s weight     |    60 Up to 4× the target’s weight     |    80 Up to 5× the target’s weight     |   100 More than 5× the target’s weight |   120
flavor_text: The user slams its target with its flame- covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the damage.

name: Moongeist Beam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Other Pokémon’s abilities cannot activate in response to this move.  In particular, it hits through disguise
flavor_text: The user emits a sinister ray to attack the target. This move can be used on the target regardless of  its Abilities.

name: Parabolic Charge
effect: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.
flavor_text: The user attacks everything around it. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by those hit.

name: Bug Buzz
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user vibrates its wings to generate a damaging sound wave. It may also lower the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

name: Psyblade
flavor_text: The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

name: Dynamic Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: An attack that always confuses.

name: Encore
effect: The next 4–8 times (selected at random) the target attempts to move, it is forced to repeat its last used move.  If the selected move allows the trainer to select a target, an opponent will be selected at random each turn.  If the target is prevented from using the selected move by some other effect, struggle will be used instead.  This effect ends if the selected move runs out of PP.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, if it does not know the selected move, or if the selected move has 0 PP remaining, this move will fail.  If the target’s last used move was encore, mimic, mirror move, sketch, struggle, or transform, this move will fail.
flavor_text: Makes the foe re­ peat 2-6 times.

name: Expanding Force
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks the target with its psychic power. This move’s power goes up and damages all opposing Pokémon on Psychic Terrain.

name: Blue Flare
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense, yet beautiful, blue flame. It may leave the target with a burn.

name: Leech Seed
effect: Plants a seed on the target that drains 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn and heals the user for the amount taken.  Has no effect on grass Pokémon.  The seed remains until the target leaves the field.  The user takes damage instead of being healed if the target has liquid ooze.  rapid spin will remove this effect.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.
flavor_text: Steals HP from the foe on every turn.

name: Protect
effect: No moves will hit the user for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.  If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail.  lock on, mind reader, and no guard provide a (100 – accuracy)% chance for moves to break through this move.  This does not apply to one-hit KO moves (fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold); those are always blocked by this move.  thunder during rain dance and blizzard during hail have a 30% chance to break through this move.  The following effects are not prevented by this move:  * acupressure from an ally * curse’s curse effect * Delayed damage from doom desire and future sight; however, these moves will be prevented if they are used this turn * feint, which will also end this move’s protection after it hits * imprison * perish song * shadow force * Moves that merely copy the user, such as transform or psych up  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: Foils attack that turn. It may fail.

name: Signal Beam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
flavor_text: A strange beam attack that may confuse the foe.

name: Drill Run
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

name: Attack Order
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: The user calls out its underlings to pummel the target. Critical hits land more easily.

name: Disarming Voice
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion.
flavor_text: Letting out a charming cry, the user does emotional damage to opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

name: Brutal Swing
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

name: Matcha Gotcha
flavor_text: The user fires a blast of tea that it mixed. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: Shed Tail
flavor_text: The user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

name: Stockpile
effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.  Stores energy for use with spit up and swallow.  Up to three levels of energy can be stored, and all are lost if the user leaves the field.  Energy is still stored even if the stat boosts cannot be applied.  If the user uses baton pass, the stat boosts are passed as normal, but the stored energy is not.
flavor_text: Charges up power for up to 3 turns.

name: Mind Reader
effect: If the user targets the same target again before the end of the next turn, the move it uses is guaranteed to hit.  This move itself also ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  One-hit KO moves are also guaranteed to hit, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  This effect also allows the user to hit Pokémon that are off the field due to moves such as dig or fly.  If the target uses detect or protect while under the effect of this move, the user is not guaranteed to hit, but has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.
flavor_text: Ensures the next attack will hit.

name: Final Gambit
effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s remaining HP.  User faints.
flavor_text: The user risks everything to attack its target. The user faints but does damage equal to the user’s HP.

name: Chatter
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has either a 1%, 11%, or 31% chance to confuse the target, based on the volume of the recording made for this move; louder recordings increase the chance of confusion.  If the user is not a chatot, this move will not cause confusion.  This move cannot be copied by mimic, mirror move, or sketch, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.
flavor_text: The user attacks using a sound wave based on words it has learned. It may also confuse the foe.

name: Defend Order
effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user calls out its underlings to make a living shield, raising its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

name: Chilly Reception
flavor_text: The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.

name: Burn Up
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Removes the user’s fire type after damage calculation.  If the user is not fire-type, this move will fail.
flavor_text: To inflict massive damage, the user burns itself out. After using this move, the user will no longer be Fire type.

name: Water Shuriken
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times.
flavor_text: The user hits the target with throwing stars two to five times in a row. This move always goes first.

name: Lucky Chant
effect: For five turns, opposing Pokémon cannot score critical hits.
flavor_text: The user chants an incantation toward the sky, preventing the foe from landing critical hits.

name: Thunder Fang
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target and a separate $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user bites with electrified fangs. It may also make the foe flinch or become paralyzed.

name: Fury Swipes
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: Quickly scratches 2-5 times.

name: Magnitude
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is selected at random between 10 and 150, with an average of 71:  Magnitude | Power | Chance --------: | ----: | -----:         4 |    10 |     5%         5 |    30 |    10%         6 |    50 |    20%         7 |    70 |    30%         8 |    90 |    20%         9 |   110 |    10%        10 |   150 |     5%  This move has double power against Pokémon currently underground due to dig.
flavor_text: A ground attack with random power.

name: Acrobatics
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the user has no held item, this move has double power.
flavor_text: The user nimbly strikes the target. If the user is not holding an item, this attack inflicts massive damage.

name: Electrify
effect: Changes the target’s move’s type to electric if it hasn’t moved yet this turn.
flavor_text: If the target is electrified before it uses a move during that turn, the target’s move becomes Electric type.

name: Nasty Plot
effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
flavor_text: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. It sharply raises the user’s Sp. Atk.

name: Jungle Healing
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user becomes one with the jungle, restoring HP and healing any status conditions of itself and its ally Pokémon in battle.

name: Scratch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Scratches with sharp claws.

name: Wave Crash
flavor_text: The user shrouds itself in water and slams into the target with its whole body to inflict damage. This also damages the user and raises the user’s action speed.

name: Psycho Boost
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
flavor_text: Allows a full-power attack, but sharply lowers SP. ATK.

name: Parting Shot
effect: Lowers all targets’ Attack and Special Attack by one stage.  Makes the user switch out.
flavor_text: With a parting threat, the user lowers the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats. Then it switches with a party Pokémon.

name: Laser Focus
effect: The user’s next move will result in a critical hit.
flavor_text: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

name: Icicle Spear
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: Attacks the foe by firing 2 to 5 icicles in a row.

name: Tailwind
effect: For the next three turns, all Pokémon on the user’s side of the field have their original Speed doubled.  This effect remains if the user leaves the field.
flavor_text: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that ups the Speed of all party Pokémon for three turns.

name: Double Edge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
flavor_text: A tackle that also hurts the user.

name: Spikes
effect: Scatters spikes around the opposing field, which damage opposing Pokémon that enter the field for 1/8 of their max HP.  Pokémon immune to ground moves are immune to this damage, except during gravity.  Up to three layers of spikes may be laid down, adding 1/16 to the damage done: two layers of spikes damage for 3/16 max HP, and three layers damage for 1/4 max HP.  wonder guard does not block damage from this effect.  rapid spin removes this effect from its user’s side of the field.  defog removes this effect from its target’s side of the field.
flavor_text: Hurts foes when they switch out.

name: Brine
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target has less than half its max HP remaining, this move has double power.
flavor_text: If the foe’s HP is down to about half, this attack will hit with double the power.

name: Relic Song
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to put the target to sleep. If the user is a meloetta, it will toggle between Aria and Pirouette Forme.
flavor_text: The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of those listening. It may also induce sleep.

name: Storm Throw
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Always scores a critical hit.
flavor_text: The user strikes the target with a fierce blow. This attack always results in a critical hit.

name: Dig
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User digs underground for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn.  During the immune turn, earthquake, fissure, and magnitude still hit the user normally, and their power is doubled if appropriate.  The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of lock on, mind reader, or no guard.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
flavor_text: 1st turn: Burrow 2nd turn: Attack

name: Clanging Scales
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the user’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user rubs the scales on its entire body and makes a huge noise to attack the opposing Pokémon. The user’s Defense stat goes down after the attack.

name: Gigaton Hammer
flavor_text: The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.

name: Razor Leaf
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: A sharp-edged leaf is launched to slash at the foe. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Quash
effect: Forces the target to act last this turn, regardless of Speed or move priority.  If the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.

name: Toxic Spikes
effect: Scatters poisoned spikes around the opposing field, which poison opposing Pokémon that enter the field.  A second layer of these spikes may be laid down, in which case Pokémon will be badly poisoned instead.  Pokémon immune to either ground moves or being poisoned are immune to this effect.  Pokémon otherwise immune to ground moves are affected during gravity.  If a poison Pokémon not immune to ground moves enters a field covered with poisoned spikes, the spikes are removed.  rapid spin will remove this effect from its user’s side of the field.  defog will remove this effect from its target’s side of the field.  This move does not trigger synchronize, unless the Pokémon with synchronize was forced to enter the field by another effect such as roar.  Pokémon entering the field due to baton pass are not affected by this effect.
flavor_text: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the foe’s feet. They poison foes that switch into battle.

name: Darkest Lariat
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage calculation ignores the target’s stat modifiers, including evasion.
flavor_text: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

name: Mystical Fire
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Scorching Sands
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: No Retreat
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn, with a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: This move raises all the user’s stats but prevents the user from switching out or fleeing.

name: Vice Grip
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: Grips with power­ ful pincers.

name: Agility
effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.
flavor_text: Sharply increases the user's SPEED.

name: Frost Breath
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Always scores a critical hit.
flavor_text: The user blows a cold breath on the target. This attack always results in a critical hit.

name: Dive
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User dives underwater for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn.  During the immune turn, surf, and whirlpool still hit the user normally, and their power is doubled if appropriate.  The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of lock on, mind reader, or no guard.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
flavor_text: Dives underwater the first turn and strikes next turn.

name: Bone Rush
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: An attack that hits 2-5 times.

name: Strength
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: A powerful physi­ cal attack.

name: Electric Terrain
effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.  Changes nature power to thunderbolt.
flavor_text: The user electrifies the ground under everyone’s feet for five turns. Pokémon on the ground no longer fall asleep.

name: Leafage
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks by pelting the target with leaves.

name: Soft Boiled
effect: Heals the user for half its max HP.
flavor_text: Restores HP by 1/2 the user's max HP.

name: Sweet Kiss
effect: Confuses the target.
flavor_text: A move that causes confusion.

name: Forests Curse
effect: Adds grass to the target’s types.
flavor_text: The user puts a forest curse on the target. Afflicted targets are now Grass type as well.

name: Judgment
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the user is holding a plate or a drive, this move’s type is the type corresponding to that item.  Note: This effect is technically shared by both techno blast and judgment; however, Techno Blast is only affected by drives, and Judgment is only affected by plates.
flavor_text: The user releases countless shots of light. Its type varies with the kind of Plate the user is holding.

name: Mortal Spin
flavor_text: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.

name: Mega Kick
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The target is attacked by a kick launched with muscle-packed power.

name: Meteor Assault
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
flavor_text: The user attacks wildly with its thick leek. The user can’t move on the next turn, because the force of this move makes it stagger.

name: Ice Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.
flavor_text: An icy punch. May cause freezing.

name: Fire Pledge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If a friendly Pokémon used water pledge earlier this turn, moves used by any friendly Pokémon have doubled effect chance for four turns (including this one).
flavor_text: A column of fire hits opposing Pokémon. When used with its Grass equivalent, its damage increases into a vast sea of fire.

name: V Create
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the user’s Defense, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
flavor_text: With a hot flame on its forehead, the user hurls itself at its target. It lowers the user’s Defense, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

name: Misty Explosion
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks everything around it and faints upon using this move. This move’s power is increased on Misty Terrain.

name: Curse
effect: If the user is a ghost: user pays half its max HP to place a curse on the target, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP every turn. Otherwise: Lowers the user’s Speed by one stage, and raises its Attack and Defense by one stage each.  The curse effect is passed on by baton pass.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
flavor_text: Works differently for ghost-types.

name: Guard Swap
effect: User swaps its Defense and Special Defense modifiers with the target.
flavor_text: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Defense and Sp. Def with the foe.

name: Rototiller
effect: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all grass Pokémon in battle.
flavor_text: Tilling the soil, the user makes it easier for plants to grow. This raises the Attack and Sp. Atk stats of Grass-type Pokémon.

name: Return
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with happiness, given by `happiness * 2 / 5`, to a maximum of 102.  Power bottoms out at 1.
flavor_text: An attack that is based on loyalty.

name: Shell Trap
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the user was not yet hit by an opponent’s physical move this turn, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user sets a shell trap. If the user is hit by a physical move, the trap will explode and inflict damage on the opposing Pokémon.

name: Water Pledge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If a friendly Pokémon used grass pledge earlier this turn, all opposing Pokémon have halved Speed for four turns (including this one).
flavor_text: A column of water strikes the target. When combined with its fire equivalent, the damage increases and a rainbow appears.

name: Bestow
effect: Transfers the user’s held item to the target.  If the user has no held item, or the target already has a held item, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user passes its held item to the target when the target isn’t holding an item.

name: Doodle
flavor_text: The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.

name: Spark
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
flavor_text: An attack that may cause paralysis.

name: Steel Roller
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks while destroying the terrain. This move fails when the ground hasn’t turned into a terrain.

name: Thunderclap
flavor_text: This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

name: Low Sweep
effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The user attacks the target’s legs swiftly, reducing the target’s Speed stat.

name: Spicy Extract
flavor_text: The user emits an incredibly spicy extract, sharply boosting the target's Attack stat and harshly lowering the target's Defense stat.

name: Iron Head
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The foe slams the target with its steel-hard head. It may also make the target flinch.

name: Last Respects
flavor_text: The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies there are in the user's party, the greater the move's power.

name: Smog
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: An attack that may poison the foe.

name: Bind
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.
flavor_text: Binds the target for 2-5 turns.

name: Metal Burst
effect: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a damaging move this turn.  Inflicts 1.5× the damage that move did to the user.  If there is no eligible target, this move will fail.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.
flavor_text: The user retaliates against the foe that last inflicted damage on it with much greater power.

name: Fairy Wind
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user stirs up a fairy wind and strikes the target with it.

name: Plasma Fists
effect: After inflicting damage, all Normal-type moves become Electric-type for the remainder of the turn, including status moves. This effect is applied after move type-changing abilities, such as Pixilate and Normalize.
flavor_text: The user attacks with electrically charged fists. This move changes Normal-type moves to Electric-type moves.

name: Clear Smog
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  All of the target’s stat modifiers are reset to zero.
flavor_text: The user attacks by throwing a clump of special mud. All status changes are returned to normal.

name: Heavy Slam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  The greater the user’s weight compared to the target’s, the higher power this move has, to a maximum of 120.  User’s weight                    | Power -------------------------------- | ----: Up to 2× the target’s weight     |    40 Up to 3× the target’s weight     |    60 Up to 4× the target’s weight     |    80 Up to 5× the target’s weight     |   100 More than 5× the target’s weight |   120
flavor_text: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater its damage.

name: Teatime
flavor_text: The user has teatime with all the Pokémon in the battle. Each Pokémon eats its held Berry.

name: Dragon Rush
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: The user tackles the foe while exhibiting overwhelming menace. It may also make the target flinch.

name: Beak Blast
effect: Begins charging at the start of the turn, then attacks as normal.  Any Pokémon that makes contact with the user while charging is burned.  The charging is not affected by accuracy, sleep, paralysis, or any other effect that would interfere with a move.
flavor_text: The user first heats up its beak, and then it attacks the target. Making direct contact with the Pokémon while it’s heating up its beak results in a burn.

name: Floral Healing
effect: Heals the target for ½ its max HP.  If grassy terrain is in effect, heals for ⅔ instead.
flavor_text: The user restores the target’s HP by up to half of its max HP. It restores more HP when the terrain is grass.

name: Burning Jealousy
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user attacks with energy from jealousy. This leaves all opposing Pokémon that have had their stats boosted during the turn with a burn.

name: Mega Drain
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: Steals 1/2 of the damage inflicted.

name: Bulldoze
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The user stomps down on the ground and attacks everything in the area. Hit Pokémon’s Speed stat is reduced.

name: Pounce
flavor_text: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

name: Spirit Break
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user attacks the target with so much force that it could break the target’s spirit. This also lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Block
effect: The target cannot switch out normally.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This effect ends when the user leaves the field.  The target may still escape by using baton pass, u turn, or a shed shell.  Both the user and the target pass on this effect with baton pass.
flavor_text: Blocks the foe’s way to prevent escape.

name: Snatch
effect: The next time a Pokémon uses a beneficial move on itself or itself and its ally this turn, the user of this move will steal the move and use it itself.  Moves which may be stolen by this move are identified by the "snatchable" flag.  If two Pokémon use this move on the same turn, the faster Pokémon will steal the first beneficial move, and the slower Pokémon will then steal it again—thus, only the slowest Pokémon using this move ultimately gains a stolen move’s effect.  If the user steals psych up, it will target the Pokémon that used psych up.  If the user was the original target of psych up, and the Pokémon that originally used it’s affected by pressure, it will only lose 1 PP.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: Steals the effects of the move the foe uses next.

name: Nature Power
effect: Uses another move chosen according to the terrain.  Terrain                   | Selected move ------------------------- | ------------------ Building                  | tri attack Cave                      | rock slide Deep water                | hydro pump Desert                    | earthquake Grass                     | seed bomb Mountain                  | rock slide Road                      | earthquake Shallow water             | hydro pump Snow                      | blizzard Tall grass                | seed bomb electric terrain | thunderbolt grassy terrain   | energy ball misty terrain    | moonblast  In Pokémon Battle Revolution:  Terrain        | Selected move -------------- | ------------------ Courtyard      | tri attack Crystal        | rock slide Gateway        | hydro pump Magma          | rock slide Main Street    | tri attack Neon           | tri attack Stargazer      | rock slide Sunny Park     | seed bomb Sunset         | earthquake Waterfall      | seed bomb  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
flavor_text: The type of attack varies depending on the location.

name: Megahorn
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: A powerful charge attack.

name: Stealth Rock
effect: Spreads sharp rocks around the opposing field, damaging any Pokémon that enters the field for 1/8 its max HP.  This damage is affected by the entering Pokémon’s susceptibility to rock moves.  rapid spin removes this effect from its user’s side of the field.
flavor_text: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the foe. The trap hurts foes that switch into battle.

name: Fissure
effect: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.  Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, endure still prevents the target from fainting.  The effects of lock on, mind reader, and no guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  However, they will not give this move a chance to break through detect or protect.
flavor_text: A ground-type, one-hit KO attack.

name: Terrain Pulse
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user utilizes the power of the terrain to attack. This move’s type and power changes depending on the terrain when it’s used.

name: Refresh
effect: Removes a burn, paralysis, or poison from the user.
flavor_text: Heals poisoning, paralysis, or a burn.

name: Speed Swap
effect: Exchanges the original Speed stats of the user and target.
flavor_text: The user exchanges Speed stats with the target.

name: Aerial Ace
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
flavor_text: An extremely speedy and unavoidable attack.

name: Harden
effect: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: Stiffens the body’s  muscles to raise DEFENSE.

name: Brave Bird
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
flavor_text: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. The user also takes serious damage.

name: Ice Spinner
flavor_text: The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.

name: Covet
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is holding an item and the user is not, the user will permanently take the item.  Damage is still inflicted if an item cannot be taken.  Pokémon with sticky hold or multitype are immune to the item theft effect.  The target cannot recover its item with recycle.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.
flavor_text: Cutely begs to obtain an item held by the foe.

name: Barrage
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: Throws orbs to hit 2-5 times.

name: Cross Poison
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move. Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: A slashing attack that may also leave the target poisoned. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Fire Lash
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user strikes the target with a burning lash. This also lowers the target’s Defense stat.

name: Cosmic Power
effect: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: Raises DEFENSE and SP. DEF with a mystic power.

name: Future Sight
effect: Inflicts typeless regular damage at the end of the third turn, starting with this one.  This move cannot score a critical hit.  If the target switches out, its replacement will be hit instead.  Damage is calculated at the time this move is used; stat changes and switching out during the delay won’t change the damage inflicted.  No move with this effect can be used against the same target again until after the end of the third turn.  This effect breaks through wonder guard.  If the target is protected by protect or detect on the turn this move is used, this move will fail.  However, the damage on the third turn will break through protection.  The damage is applied at the end of the turn, so it ignores endure and focus sash.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
flavor_text: An attack that hits on 3rd turn.

name: Gear Grind
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn.
flavor_text: The user attacks by throwing two steel gears at its target.

name: Close Combat
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.
flavor_text: The user fights the foe in close without guarding itself. It also cuts the user’s Defense and Sp. Def.

name: Embargo
effect: Target cannot use its held item for five turns.  If the target leaves the field, this effect ends.  If a Pokémon under this effect uses bug bite or pluck on a Pokémon holding a berry, the berry is destroyed but not used.  If a Pokémon under this effect uses fling, it will fail.  This effect is passed by baton pass.
flavor_text: It prevents the foe from using its held item. Its Trainer is also prevented from using items on it.

name: Aurora Beam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may lower ATTACK.

name: Mat Block
effect: Protects all friendly Pokémon from damaging moves.  Only works on the first turn after the user is sent out.
flavor_text: Using a pulled-up mat as a shield, the user protects itself and its allies from damaging moves. This does not stop status moves.

name: Pyro Ball
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The user attacks by igniting a small stone and launching it as a fiery ball at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: Shift Gear
effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage and its Speed by two stages.
flavor_text: The user rotates its gears, raising its Attack and sharply raising its Speed.

name: Focus Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the user takes damage this turn before hitting, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.
flavor_text: A powerful loyalty attack. The user flinches if hit.

name: Cotton Guard
effect: Raises the user’s Defense by three stages.
flavor_text: The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, drastically raising the user’s Defense stat.

name: Lash Out
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. If the user’s stats were lowered during this turn, the power of this move is doubled.

name: Dire Claw
flavor_text: The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws, aiming to land a critical hit. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or drowsy.

name: Wake Up Slap
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is sleeping, this move has double power, and the target wakes up.
flavor_text: This attack inflicts high damage on a sleeping foe. It also wakes the foe up, however.

name: Sacred Fire
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.  Frozen Pokémon may use this move, in which case they will thaw.
flavor_text: An attack that may inflict a burn.

name: Facade
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned, this move has double power.
flavor_text: Boosts ATTACK when burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

name: False Swipe
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Will not reduce the target’s HP below 1.
flavor_text: Leaves the foe with at least 1HP.

name: Ember
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
flavor_text: The foe is attacked with small flames. The foe may suffer a burn.

name: Drum Beating
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The user plays its drum, controlling the drum’s roots to attack the target. This also lowers the target’s Speed stat.

name: Aurora Veil
effect: Places the Aurora Veil effect on the user’s side of the field for the next 5 turns.  If the weather is not hail, or the weather is disabled by the effects of cloud nine or air lock, this move will fail.  Any regular damage dealt to an affected Pokémon is reduced by ½.  (If there are multiple Pokémon on the affected field, the reduction is ⅓.)
flavor_text: This move reduces damage from physical and special moves for five turns. This can be used only in a hailstorm.

name: Armor Cannon
flavor_text: The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

name: Memento
effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages.  User faints.
flavor_text: The user faints and lowers the foe’s abilities.

name: Fairy Lock
effect: Prevents all Pokémon from fleeing or switching out during the next turn.
flavor_text: By locking down the battlefield, the user keeps all Pokémon from fleeing during the next turn.

name: Hyper Voice
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: A loud attack that uses sound waves to injure.

name: Purify
effect: Cures the target of its major status ailment and heals the user for 50% of its max HP.  If the target has no major status ailment, this move will fail.
flavor_text: The user heals the target’s status condition. If the move succeeds, it also restores the user’s own HP.

name: Poison Sting
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: An attack that may poison the target.

name: Take Down
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
flavor_text: A tackle that also hurts the user.

name: Sweet Scent
effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.
flavor_text: Reduces the foe's evasiveness.

name: Gastro Acid
effect: The target’s ability is disabled as long as it remains on the field.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.
flavor_text: The user hurls up its stomach acids on the foe. The fluid eliminates the effect of the foe’s ability.

name: Belch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Can only be used if the user has eaten a berry since the beginning of the battle.  After the user eats a berry, it may use this move any number of times until the end of the battle, even if it switches out.  Eating a held berry, eating a berry via bug bite or pluck, or being the target of a Flung berry will enable this move.  Feeding a Pokémon a berry from the bag or using natural gift will not.  If the trainer chooses this move when it cannot be used, the choice is rejected outright and the trainer must choose another move.
flavor_text: The user lets out a damaging belch at the target. The user must eat a held Berry to use this move.

name: Revival Blessing
flavor_text: The user bestows a loving blessing, reviving a party Pokémon that has fainted and restoring half that Pokémon's max HP.

name: Meteor Beam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: In this two-turn attack, the user gathers space power and boosts its Sp. Atk stat, then attacks the target on the next turn.

name: Shell Smash
effect: Raises the user’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by two stages each.  Lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.
flavor_text: The user breaks its shell, lowering its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply raising Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

name: Mimic
effect: This move is replaced by the target’s last successfully used move, and its PP changes to 5.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, or if the user already knows the targeted move, this move will fail.  This effect vanishes when the user leaves the field.  If chatter, metronome, mimic, sketch, or struggle is selected, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome, nor forced by encore.
flavor_text: Copies a move used by the foe.

name: Gunk Shot
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.
flavor_text: The user shoots filthy garbage at the foe to attack. It may also poison the target.

name: Take Heart
flavor_text: The user lifts its spirits, healing its own status conditions and raising its offensive and defensive stats.

name: Super Fang
effect: Inflicts typeless damage equal to half the target’s remaining HP.
flavor_text: Cuts the foe's HP by 1/2.

name: Dragon Darts
flavor_text: The user attacks twice using Dreepy. If there are two targets, this move hits each target once.

name: Sleep Talk
effect: Only usable if the user is sleeping.  Randomly selects and uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Use of the selected move requires and costs 0 PP.  This move will not select assist, bide, bounce, chatter, copycat, dig, dive, fly, focus punch, me first, metronome, mirror move, shadow force, skull bash, sky attack, sky drop, sleep talk, solar beam, razor wind, or uproar.  If the selected move requires a recharge turn—i.e., one of blast burn, frenzy plant, giga impact, hydro cannon, hyper beam, roar of time, or rock wrecker—and the user is still sleeping next turn, then it’s forced to use this move again and pay another PP for the recharge turn.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.
flavor_text: Randomly attacks while asleep.

name: Kowtow Cleave
flavor_text: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

name: Aqua Step
flavor_text: The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

name: Flip Turn
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

name: Metal Sound
effect: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: Emits a horrible screech that sharply lowers SP. DEF.

name: Light Screen
effect: Erects a barrier around the user’s side of the field that reduces damage from special attacks by half for five turns.  In double battles, the reduction is 1/3.  Critical hits are not affected by the barrier.  If the user is holding light clay, the barrier lasts for eight turns.  brick break or defog used by an opponent will destroy the barrier.
flavor_text: Ups SPCL.DEF with a wall of light.

name: Last Resort
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  This move can only be used if each of the user’s other moves has been used at least once since the user entered the field.  If this is the user’s only move, this move will fail.
flavor_text: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

name: Thrash
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.  safeguard does not protect against the confusion from this move.
flavor_text: Works 2-3 turns and confuses user.

name: Octazooka
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may reduce accuracy.

name: Skull Bash
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.  User then charges for one turn before attacking.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
flavor_text: 1st turn: Prepare 2nd turn: Attack

name: Smokescreen
effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: Lowers the foe's accuracy.

name: Bullet Seed
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.
flavor_text: Shoots 2 to 5 seeds in a row to strike the foe.

name: Avalanche
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target damaged the user this turn and was the last to do so, this move has double power.  pain split does not count as damaging the user.
flavor_text: An attack move that inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the foe in the same turn.

name: Stomp
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.  Power is doubled against Pokémon that have used minimize since entering the field.
flavor_text: An attack that may cause flinching.

name: Psywave
effect: Inflicts typeless damage between 50% and 150% of the user’s level, selected at random in increments of 10%.
flavor_text: An attack with variable power.

name: Make It Rain
flavor_text: The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.

name: Energy Ball
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the foe. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

name: Whirlpool
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  If the target is in the first turn of dive, this move will hit with double power.
flavor_text: Traps the foe for 2-5 turns.

name: Stone Edge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: The user stabs the foe with a sharpened stone. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

name: Hypnosis
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: May put the foe to sleep.

name: Collision Course
flavor_text: The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.

name: Mud Slap
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
flavor_text: Reduces the foe's accuracy.

name: Rollout
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to use this move for five turns.  Power doubles every time this move is used in succession to a maximum of 16x, and resets to normal after the lock-in ends.  If this move misses or becomes unusable, the lock-in ends.  If the user has used defense curl since entering the field, this move has double power.
flavor_text: Attacks 5 turns with rising power.

name: Tera Starstorm
flavor_text: With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.

name: Heal Order
effect: Heals the user for half its max HP.
flavor_text: The user calls out its underlings to heal it. The user regains up to half of its max HP.

name: Bubble
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may reduce SPEED.

name: Healing Wish
effect: User faints.  Its replacement’s HP is fully restored, and any major status effect is removed.  If the replacement Pokémon is immediately fainted by a switch-in effect, the next replacement is healed by this move instead.
flavor_text: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP restored and status cured.

name: Grass Pledge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If a friendly Pokémon used fire pledge earlier this turn, all opposing Pokémon will take 1/8 their max HP in damage at the end of every turn for four turns (including this one).
flavor_text: A column of grass hits opposing Pokémon. When used with its water equivalent, its damage increases into a vast swamp.

name: Aura Sphere
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
flavor_text: The user looses a blast of aura power from deep within its body. This move is certain to hit.

name: Stomping Tantrum
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is doubled if the user’s last move failed for any reason (i.e., produced the message "But it failed!") or was ineffective due to types.
flavor_text: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. If the user’s previous move has failed, the power of this move doubles.

name: Howl
effect: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: Howls to raise the spirit and boosts ATTACK.

name: Sunsteel Strike
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Other Pokémon’s abilities cannot activate in response to this move.  In particular, it hits through disguise
flavor_text: The user slams into the target with the force of a meteor. This move can be used on the target  regardless of its Abilities.

name: Crabhammer
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: Has a high criti­ cal hit ratio.

name: Magic Coat
effect: The first non-damaging move targeting the user this turn that inflicts major status effects, stat changes, or trapping effects will be reflected at its user.  defog, memento, and teeter dance are not reflected.  attract, flatter, gastro acid, leech seed, swagger, worry seed, and yawn are reflected.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
flavor_text: Reflects special effects back to the attacker.

name: Magic Room
effect: For five turns (including this one), passive effects of held items are ignored, and Pokémon will not use their held items.
flavor_text: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon’s held items lose their effects for five turns.

name: Thunder Wave
effect: Paralyzes the target.
flavor_text: A move that may cause paralysis.

name: Hydro Cannon
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
flavor_text: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

name: Razor Shell
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: The user cuts its target with sharp shells. This attack may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

name: Fury Cutter
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power doubles after every time this move is used, whether consecutively or not, maxing out at 16x.  If this move misses or the user leaves the field, power resets.
flavor_text: Successive hits raise power.

name: Morning Sun
effect: Heals the user for half its max HP.  During sunny day, the healing is increased to 2/3 max HP.  During hail, rain dance, or sandstorm, the healing is decreased to 1/4 max HP.
flavor_text: Restores HP (varies by time).

name: Grass Knot
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the target’s weight in kilograms, to a maximum of 120.  Target’s weight | Power --------------- | ----: Up to 10kg      |    20 Up to 25kg      |    40 Up to 50kg      |    60 Up to 100kg     |    80 Up to 200kg     |   100 Above 200kg     |   120
flavor_text: The user snares the foe with grass and trips it. The heavier the foe, the greater the damage.

name: Mega Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: A powerful punch thrown very hard.

name: Rolling Kick
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
flavor_text: A fast, spinning kick.

name: Fusion Bolt
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  If a friendly Pokémon used fusion flare earlier this turn, this move has double power.
flavor_text: The user throws down a giant thunderbolt. This attack does greater damage when influenced by an enormous flame.

name: Scale Shot
effect: Inflicts regular damage two to five times in a row, raising the user’s Speed and lowering the user’s Defense by one stage each upon last hit.
flavor_text: The user attacks by shooting scales two to five times in a row. This move boosts the user’s Speed stat but lowers its Defense stat.

name: Iron Tail
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: An attack that may reduce DEFENSE.

name: Taunt
effect: Target is forced to only use damaging moves for the next 3–5 turns, selected at random.  Moves that select other moves not known in advance do not count as damaging.  assist, copycat, me first, metronome, mirror move, and sleep talk do not directly inflict damage and thus may not be used.  bide, counter, endeavor, metal burst, and mirror coat are allowed.
flavor_text: Taunts the foe into only using attack moves.

name: Spit Up
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is equal to 100 times the amount of energy stored by stockpile.  Ignores the random factor in the damage formula.  Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if stockpile had not been used.  If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.
flavor_text: Releases stockpiled power (the more the better).

name: Absorb
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
flavor_text: Steals 1/2 of the damage inflicted.

name: Mind Blown
effect: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up. The user still takes damage if the move is blocked by Protect or Substitute, misses, or if the target has Flash Fire.
flavor_text: The user attacks everything around it by causing its own head to explode. This also damages the user.

name: Teeter Dance
effect: Confuses all targets.
flavor_text: Confuses all POKéMON on the scene.

name: Fell Stinger
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Raises the user’s Attack by two stages if it KOs the target.
flavor_text: When the user knocks out a target with this move, the user’s Attack stat rises sharply.

name: Chip Away
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage calculation ignores the target’s stat modifiers, including evasion.
flavor_text: Looking for an opening, the user strikes continually. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

name: Mach Punch
effect: Inflicts regular damage.
flavor_text: A fast punch that lands first.

name: Mud Sport
effect: electric moves inflict half damage, regardless of target.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.
flavor_text: Covers the user in mud to raise electrical resistance.

name: Tri Attack
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.  One of these effects is selected at random; they do not each have independent chances to occur.
flavor_text: Fires three kinds of beams at once.

name: Lovely Kiss
effect: Puts the target to sleep.
flavor_text: May cause the foe to fall asleep.

name: Freeze Dry
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  This move is super-effective against the water type.  The target’s other type will affect damage as usual.  If this move’s type is changed, it remains super-effective against Water regardless of its type.
flavor_text: The user rapidly cools the target. This may also leave the target frozen. This move is super effective on Water types.

name: Apple Acid
flavor_text: The user attacks the target with an acidic liquid created from tart apples. This also lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat.

name: Cross Chop
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
flavor_text: Has a high criti­ cal hit ratio.

name: Silk Trap
flavor_text: The user spins a silken trap, protecting itself from damage while lowering the Speed stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.

name: Screech
effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.
flavor_text: Sharply reduces the foe's DEFENSE.

name: Misty Terrain
effect: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion and weakens dragon moves used against them to 0.5× their power.  Changes nature power to moonblast.
flavor_text: The user covers the ground under everyone’s feet with mist for five turns. This protects Pokémon on the ground from status conditions.

name: Flame Charge
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Raises the user’s Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: The user cloaks itself with flame and attacks. Building up more power, it raises the user’s Speed stat.

name: Overdrive
flavor_text: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by twanging a guitar or bass guitar, causing a huge echo and strong vibration.

name: Glare
effect: Paralyzes the target.
flavor_text: A move that may cause paralysis.

name: Rain Dance
effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns, during which water moves inflict 50% extra damage, and fire moves inflict half damage.  If the user is holding damp rock, this effect lasts for eight turns.  thunder has 100% accuracy.  If the target has used detect or protect, thunder has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection.  solar beam has half power.  moonlight, morning sun, and synthesis heal only 1/4 of the user’s max HP.  Pokémon with swift swim have doubled original Speed.  Pokémon with forecast become water.  Pokémon with dry skin heal 1/8 max HP, Pokémon with hydration are cured of major status effects, and Pokémon with rain dish heal 1/16 max HP at the end of each turn.
flavor_text: Boosts the power of WATER- type moves for 5 turns.

name: Synthesis
effect: Heals the user for half its max HP.  During sunny day, the healing is increased to 2/3 max HP.  During hail, rain dance, or sandstorm, the healing is decreased to 1/4 max HP.
flavor_text: Restores HP (varies by time).

name: Shadow Force
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User vanishes for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn.  This move ignores the effects of detect and protect.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.
flavor_text: The user disappears, then strikes the foe on the second turn. It hits even if the foe used Protect.

name: Ice Ball
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to use this move for five turns.  Power doubles every time this move is used in succession to a maximum of 16x, and resets to normal after the lock-in ends.  If this move misses or becomes unusable, the lock-in ends.  If the user has used defense curl since entering the field, this move has double power.
flavor_text: A 5-turn attack that gains power on successive hits.

name: Double Shock
flavor_text: The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.

name: Sky Uppercut
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  This move can hit Pokémon under the effect of bounce, fly, or sky drop.
flavor_text: An uppercut thrown as if leaping into the sky.

name: Eerie Impulse
effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.
flavor_text: The user’s body generates an eerie impulse. Exposing the target to it harshly lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Charge Beam
effect: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: The user fires a concentrated bundle of electricity. It may also raise the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

name: Upper Hand
flavor_text: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

name: Snipe Shot
effect: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) sets reflect on the user’s side of the field.
flavor_text: The user ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s moves and Abilities that draw in moves, allowing this move to hit the chosen target.

name: Fickle Beam
flavor_text: The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.
